hero.badge: Jefa Kuri'a na Jama'a Yanzu a Buɗe
hero.title: Girmama
hero.tagline: Kare da Cimma Ilimi ga Kowa a Afirka
hero.description: Kyautar Ma'aunin Ilimi Sabuwa ta Afirka ({{edition}}) tana murnar shugabanni masu hangen nesa, cibiyoyi da masu kirkirar abubuwa da ke gina makomar ilimi a duk fadin Afirka.

watchLive.title: Kallo Kai Tsaye
watchLive.description: NESA Africa TV tana watsa shirye-shirye a kafofin watsa labarun zamantakewa, tashoshin abokan hulɗa da aikace-aikacen CAST TV.

quote.text: {{editionName}} ba taron ba ne. Zagaye ne na lissafin ilimi wanda ke haɗa:
quote.footer: An bayar da shi tare da mulki, gaskiya da muhimmancin nahiya.

trophyHero.headline: Gane Nagarta a Cikin
trophyHero.tagline: Girmama Masu Canza Ilimi a Afirka
trophyHero.valueProposition: Dandali na gane na nahiya mai tushe na ka'idoji, wanda ke murna da girmama masu canza yanayin da ke fafutikar "Ilimi ga Kowa" a Afirka, yana gane tasiri da aka tabbatar, da bada damar shiga jama'a cikin tsari a duk nahiyar.
trophyHero.trophyCaption: Babban Girmamawa na Ilimi na Afirka

whatsLive.title: Abubuwan Da Za Su Faru da Jefa Kuri'a
whatsLive.comingSoon: Yana zuwa nan ba da dadewa ba...

howItWorksVisual.title: Yadda NESA-Afirka Ke Aiki
howItWorksVisual.description: Daga gane zuwa tasiri mai dorewa — kowane mataki yana da muhimmanci.
howItWorksVisual.agcNote: Shiga yana bude maki na jefa kuri'a. Jefa kuri'a yana amfani da AGC yayin tagogi na hukuma.

voteWithAGC.title: Shiga Afrigold
voteWithAGC.description: Shigarka yana samun maka Kiredin Afrigold (AGCc) — kiredin shiga don tallafawa wadanda aka tsaya na Zinare da Blue Garnet.
voteWithAGC.joinDesc: Kirkiri asusunka ka shiga ta hanyar tsayawa, shawarwar da ayyukan yau da kullun.
voteWithAGC.earnDesc: Shigarka yana bude makin jefa kuri'a AGC.
voteWithAGC.voteDesc: Yi amfani da AGC naka yayin tagogi na hukuma.
voteWithAGC.impactDesc: Ana sanar da masu nasara kuma kudade suna zuwa ga ayyukan Sake Gina Makarantata Afirka.
voteWithAGC.conversionNote: 10 AGCc = 1 AGC — AGCc tana canzawa kai tsaye zuwa AGC. 1 Kuri'a = 1 AGC.
voteWithAGC.auditPoint: Ana rubuta dukkan kuri'u tare da bin diddigi
voteWithAGC.disclaimer: AGC ba za a iya cinikin ta ba — babu cirewa, babu biya. AGC ba kudin dijital ba ce.

integrity.title: Kariya da Gaskiya
integrity.description: Kariyar gaskiya mai tushe na cancanta tana kare kowane mataki na tsarin kyaututtuka.
integrity.platinumDesc: Ba mai fafatawa ba. Tabbatarwa + kula da mulki.
integrity.goldDesc: Shiga jama'a kadai. Bin diddigi mai gaskiya.
integrity.blueGarnetDesc: Daidaiton alkali + jama'a. Kariya daga zamba.
integrity.sponsorsDesc: Masu tallafawa ba za su iya rinjayar masu nasara ba.
integrity.agcDisclaimer: AGC ba za a iya cinikin ta ba — babu cirewa, babu biya.

legacyImpact.badge: Gadon Bayan Kyauta • Tasirin Jama'a na SCEF
legacyImpact.title: Sake Gina Makarantata
legacyImpact.description: Makaranta guda na bukatu na musamman a kowane yankin Afirka — jama'a sun tsaya, an zaɓa ta jefa kuri'a, an canza ta hanyar EduAid-Africa.
legacyImpact.attribution: Shirin gadon bayan kyauta na Gidauniyar Santos Creations Educational

nominationPaths.title: Fara Tafiyar Tsayawa
nominationPaths.description: Zaɓi rukunin kyauta da ya dace bisa ga nasarorin mai tsayawa.
nominationPaths.votingFeature1: Samu makin jefa kuri'a ta shiga
nominationPaths.votingFeature2: Jefa kuri'a da AGC yayin tagogi na hukuma
nominationPaths.platinumFeature2: Ba a bukata jefa kuri'ar jama'a

meta.title: Game da NESA-Afirka | Kyautar Ma'aunin Ilimi Sabuwa ta Afirka
meta.description: NESA-Afirka wani dandali ne na lissafin ilimi da ke gane masu canza al'amura da ke tsara makomar ilimi a Afirka.

hero.title: Game da
hero.description: Kyautar Ma'aunin Ilimi Sabuwa ta Afirka ba gidan yanar gizo na kyaututtuka ba ne. Dandali ne na lissafin ilimi da ke murnar zakarun ilimi na Afirka.

missionSection.title: Manufarmu
missionSection.description: Gane, tabbatar da murnar mutane da cibiyoyi da ke tallafawa Ilimi ga Kowa a duk fadin Afirka.

recognition.title: Sanin Kai
recognition.description: Murnar zakarun ilimi na Afirka ta hanyar kyaututtuka da suka dogara da cancanta.

accountability.title: Lissafi
accountability.description: Kariyar mulki tana tabbatar da 'yancin masu tallafawa da amincin jefa kuri'a.

continentalReach.title: Isasshen Nahiya
continentalReach.description: Hanyar yanki-farko da ke rufe dukkan yankuna 5 na Afirka da kuma waɗanda ke waje.

impact.title: Tasiri
impact.description: Haɓaka Ilimi ga Kowa ta hanyar gani da tabbatarwa.

awardTiers.title: Matakan Kyaututtuka
awardTiers.description: Dandali huɗu na daban-daban tare da ma'auni na musamman.

platinum.title: Satifiket na Platinum
platinum.description: Sanin tushe don gudummawa ga Ilimi ga Kowa. Ba mai fafatawa ba, NRC ta tabbatar.

icon.title: Alamar Ilimi na Afirka
icon.description: Sanin nasarorin rayuwa. Ƙananan rukunoni 3 a Afirka, waɗanda ke waje da Abokan Afirka.

gold.title: Satifiket na Zinare
gold.description: Sanin gasa ta hanyar jefa kuri'ar jama'a 100%.

blueGarnet.title: Kyautar Blue Garnet
blueGarnet.description: Babban girmamawa — 60% alkali, 40% jefa kuri'ar jama'a. Masu nasara 9 a Gala.

categories.title: Rukunonin Kyaututtuka
categories.description: Bincika rukunonin kyaututtuka 17 da ke gane inganci a sashen ilimi na Afirka

meta.title: Rukunonin Kyaututtuka | {{editionName}}
meta.description: Bincika dukkan rukunoni 17 na NESA-Afirka da ƙananan rukunoni 138+.

hero.title: Rukunoni 17 na Kyaututtuka na Hukuma
hero.description: Murnar nagarta a ilimi, alhakin kamfani da fasaha a duk nahiyar Afirka.

cta.title: Kuna Shirye Tsayar?

ediIntegrity.description: Kowane mataki na aikin kyaututtukan NESA-Africa ana gudanar da shi ta hanyar Alamar Ci gaban Ilimi — daga tsayawa zuwa zaɓen ƙarshe.
